hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bears are dumping hard, spooked by either macro headwinds or a failed breakout, but 47.5% odds still bake in a 22% decline from here when BTC typically finds support clusters well above that level. The real tell is volume at $1.5M is anemic for a -10 point dump, suggesting weak conviction selling and a potential trap for the bears who are overweighting tail risk.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin bulls just got cheaper insurance against a $45K crash.
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin's dip odds fell 10 points overnight to 47.5%, signaling traders rotated risk off the table. But a 50/50 coin flip on a 35% pullover 2 years is mispriced when macro tailwinds (Fed cuts, rate volatility) are locked in. Smart money is quietly buying the downside here.
